2026-04-09T06:17:20.9432500Z The agent output is a legitimate documentation gap report consistent with the workflow's purpose. It:
2026-04-09T06:17:24.9854328Z - Identifies missing documentation sections in a new `Azure.Provisioning.MySql` package
